subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: There are two equinoxes, the vernal (Aries) and the autumnal (Libra). Before this vernal season, the earth, mountains, and gardens are as dead; this season brings life.
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual springtime
